mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`savings_account` (account_id, linked_account_id, installment_amount, term_months, payment_day, maturity_date) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{linkedAccountId}, #{installmentAmount}, #{termMonths}, #{paymentDay}, #{maturityDate})
mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, installment_amount AS installmentAmount, term_months AS termMonths, payment_day AS paymentDay, maturity_date AS maturityDate FROM `bank`.`savings_account` WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, account_id AS accountId, due_date AS dueDate, installment_amount AS installmentAmount, status, paid_at AS paidAt FROM `bank`.`savings_schedule` WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND due_date <= #{today}
